query: SELECT bookTitle, ratingCount, HEX(ratingCount) as hex_val FROM book_profiles WHERE ratingCount IS NOT NULL AND ratingCount != '' AND CAST(ratingCount AS UNSIGNED) = 0 AND ratingCount != '0';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT bookTitle, ratingCount, HEX(ratingCount) as hex_val FROM book_profiles WHERE ratingCount IS NOT NULL AND ratingCount != '' AND CAST(ratingCount AS UNSIGNED) = 0 AND ratingCount != '0';
